FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Visible name, e.g. 2026-2027

FIELD.NAME: shortname
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable unique identifier

FIELD.NAME: createdby
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.id, not enforced at DB level per Moodle convention

FIELD.NAME: modifiedby
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.id, not enforced at DB level per Moodle convention

TABLE.NAME: local_tut_reason
TABLE.COMMENT: Configurable tutoring reasons catalogue for local_monlaututoria

FIELD.NAME: shortname
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable identifier, never the translated name, used by application logic

FIELD.NAME: defaultvisibility
FIELD.COMMENT: 0=shared with student, 1=internal tutoring, 2=restricted

TABLE.NAME: local_tut_modality
TABLE.COMMENT: Configurable contact modalities catalogue for local_monlaututoria

FIELD.NAME: shortname
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable identifier, never the translated name, used by application logic

FIELD.NAME: studentid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.id, not enforced at DB level per Moodle convention

FIELD.NAME: tutorid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.id, not enforced at DB level per Moodle convention

FIELD.NAME: cohortid
FIELD.COMMENT: Null when source=manual; FK to cohort.id, not enforced at DB level

FIELD.NAME: academicyearid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to local_tut_academicyear.id, not enforced at DB level

FIELD.NAME: assignmenttype
FIELD.COMMENT: primary, co_tutor, support, orientation, other

FIELD.NAME: isprimary
FIELD.COMMENT: Must be 1 only when assignmenttype=primary

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: active, closed, cancelled, pending

FIELD.NAME: timeend
FIELD.COMMENT: Null while active; set only when the assignment is closed

FIELD.NAME: source
FIELD.COMMENT: manual, cohort, csv, external, migration

FIELD.NAME: externalid
FIELD.COMMENT: Reserved for phase 3D external/CSV reconciliation; unused in phase 3A

FIELD.NAME: note
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional administrative note, editable via assignments/edit.php (phase 3B.2)

FIELD.NAME: closereason
FIELD.COMMENT: Coded reason set when the assignment is closed via assignments/close.php (phase 3B.3), see assignment_close_reason

FIELD.NAME: reassignreason
FIELD.COMMENT: Coded reason set on the new row when created via reassign_primary_tutor() (phase 3B.4A/4.2), see assignment_reassign_reason. Null on every row not created by a reassignment

TABLE.NAME: local_tut_bulkoperation
TABLE.COMMENT: Bulk assignment operations for local_monlaututoria: cohort-based (phase 3C.1) and CSV import (phase 3D.2). Preview only so far, no per-student rows persisted

FIELD.NAME: operationuuid
FIELD.COMMENT: RFC4122 v4 UUID correlating preview, confirmation and execution across requests

FIELD.NAME: operationtype
FIELD.COMMENT: cohort_assignment or csv_import

FIELD.NAME: cohortid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to cohort.id, not enforced at DB level; null for csv_import operations (no single cohort)

FIELD.NAME: academicyearid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to local_tut_academicyear.id, not enforced at DB level; null for csv_import operations (each row may specify a different year)

FIELD.NAME: primarytutorid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.id, not enforced at DB level; null for csv_import operations (each row specifies its own tutor)

FIELD.NAME: cotutorid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.id, not enforced at DB level; null when no co-tutor was selected

FIELD.NAME: mode
FIELD.COMMENT: preview_only, add_only, add_and_close_missing, replace_primary; null for csv_import operations

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: draft, previewed, confirmed, processing, completed, completed_with_errors, failed, cancelled — only draft/previewed produced until phase 3C.3+/3D.3+

FIELD.NAME: parametersjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Secondary configuration (dates, flags); never per-student data

FIELD.NAME: summaryjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Aggregate counts computed at preview time, used to detect drift on revalidation
